raw_consumer_statement: A account was opened up under my name at amex under a fraudulent name using my social security number with a address on the other side of the XXXX. There were multiple accounts opened up using my social security number which I will add screen shots for. I discovered this issue when trying to verify my credit to rent a apartment. I called amex to cancel all accounts on XX/XX/XXXX and to report the fraud opening of an account with them. It took amex till XX/XX/XXXX tp actually close out the account and the person committing the fraud was able to post payments during this time. After 33 days amex said they are still working on this but can not provide me any updates or documentation around where they are in the process. I provided them my address and information several times but despite that they cancelled the initial investigation stating the addess of payments received came from the fraud address which matched their records and past their checks resulting in a new case at XXXX being opened for the same original issue. They have been providing me incorrect information and conflicting information over the XXXX times that I called them despite having all of our conversations recorded. I need this issue resolved ASAP so I can rent a apartment and recover my credit score. I don't have the card number or account number at amex since I never actually opened the account or filed for the new cars and amex will not provide me this information.
